businesses.name: Alabama Gulf Coast Zoo
businesses.tagline: Education • Conservation • Adventure • Community
businesses.description: The Alabama Gulf Coast Zoo is home to a richly diverse and decidedly unique population of animals for a small-town community zoo. With 118 species and 22 critically endangered species, every animal has a name and a backstory. The zoo is committed to education, conservation, adventure, and community engagement. Located in Gulf Shores, Alabama, the zoo offers daily keeper presentations, animal adventures, and premium animal experiences.

businesses.name: Amberjack E-bike Rentals
businesses.tagline: Gulf Shores e-bike rentals with trail access. Shop pickup & free 2+ day delivery.
businesses.description: Amberjack E-bike Rentals offers family-friendly e-bike rentals in Gulf Shores, Alabama with convenient shop pickup and free delivery for 2+ day rentals. Easy to ride electric bikes with access to local trails.

businesses.name: Anchor Bar & Grill
businesses.tagline: The best burgers and fries in the Twin Ports!
businesses.description: Anchor Bar & Grill is a unique and popular restaurant and pub in Superior, Wisconsin, known for serving the best burgers and fries around. Featured on the TV show Diners, Drive-Ins, and Dives, this iconic dive bar offers a variety of homemade burgers and fresh-cut fries at great prices. The walls are covered with nautical memorabilia and artifacts. The restaurant features a game room and outdoor seating. Founded over 20 years ago, it's a must-visit destination in the Superior area.

businesses.name: Angry Crab Shack
businesses.tagline: Family Fun & Casual Dining - Dig into bold seafood boils & Cajun flavors
businesses.description: Angry Crab Shack is a casual Cajun/Creole-style seafood restaurant famous for its customizable seafood boils. Think crab, shrimp, crawfish, lobster, and more with bold Asian-Cajun sauces and spice levels. Beyond boils, many locations also offer appetizers, sandwiches, Po'Boys, fried seafood baskets, salads, and non-seafood options like chicken or burgers. Whether you are celebrating a big birthday, a milestone anniversary, or another special occasion, Angry Crab Shack is the place for a one-of-a-kind experience, with multiple locations worldwide. Delicious food, a fun environment, and a team of amazing staff make a visit to Angry Crab Shack memorable for everyone. Bibs are provided to keep shirts clean, but you can get as messy as you want as the tables are covered with paper. Those who do not love seafood can choose from flavorful Po'Boys, delicious cheeseburgers, juicy chicken sandwiches, and more. Angry Crab Shack even offers vegetable and tofu options for vegetarians.

businesses.name: Bahama Bob's
businesses.tagline: Lower the Latitude Better the Attitude
businesses.description: Bahama Bob's is a beachside restaurant in Gulf Shores, Alabama, offering fresh seafood, burgers, and classic beach fare. Known for generous portions, crispy fries, excellent service, and a friendly, welcoming atmosphere. A local favorite for lunch and dinner with a cozy, clean dining environment perfect for families and groups.

businesses.name: Barometer Waterfront Grille
businesses.tagline: Where the pressure is just right.
businesses.description: Barometer Waterfront Grille is a Gulf Coast gem, combining fresh, expertly crafted seafood dishes with coastal-inspired cuisine and handcrafted cocktails. Nestled along the water, this must-visit destination offers a relaxing atmosphere perfect for savoring tropical flavors while soaking in breathtaking waterfront views. Whether you're enjoying a casual meal or a special occasion, Barometer Waterfront Grille delivers an unforgettable dining experience with a true taste of paradise. The menu features fresh, locally-sourced ingredients crafted into coastal classics and modern favorites. From signature coastal-inspired creations to timeless classics, each drink is expertly prepared with high-quality ingredients and creative flair. Whether you're in the mood for a tropical escape or a bold, spirited blend, the bar has something to delight every taste.

businesses.name: Beachside Circle Boats
businesses.description: Beachside Circle Boats offers eco-friendly, portable circle boat rentals in Orange Beach, Alabama. Powered by electric motors with zero emissions.

businesses.name: Big Beach Brewing Company
businesses.tagline: Alabama's southernmost brewery
businesses.description: Big Beach Brewing Company is Alabama's southernmost brewery, located in Gulf Shores, Alabama. The brewery features beer and wine on tap, live music, and events.

businesses.name: Big Mike's Steakhouse
businesses.tagline: Voted #1 Ribeye in the State of Alabama by Alabama Cattlemen's Association!
businesses.description: Big Mike's Steakhouse is a casual steakhouse that serves Certified Angus Beef and has been voted Alabama's Best Steak by the Alabama Cattlemen's Association. With multiple locations across Alabama, we offer a first-come, first-serve dining experience with full bars at each location. We specialize in premium steaks and offer weekly chef features, private parties, and catering services with custom grilling available for off-site events.

businesses.name: Bleus Burger
businesses.tagline: Burgers, Craft Beer & Cocktails
businesses.description: Bleus Burger in Gulf Shores, AL, elevates the humble burger to an art form. We specialize in gourmet craft smash burgers, alongside crispy wings, juicy tenders, and inventive sandwiches. Not just a burger joint, we offer vibrant veggie options and fresh salads. Pair your meal with a handcrafted cocktail or explore our selection of fifteen craft beers on tap. It's flavor, elevated. We use 100% FRESH CAB chuck, sourced from Alabama-based, family owned Evans Meats. All burger sauces are made in house daily. Our burgers are 100% fresh, NEVER frozen, premium CAB beef, hand-smashed to order.

businesses.name: Bottomed Out Fishing Charters
businesses.tagline: Private Deep Sea Fishing Charters
businesses.description: Bottomed Out Fishing Charters is your trusted name in Gulf Shores deep sea fishing. Captain Ken Tompkins brings years of experience on the Gulf of Mexico, running trips out of Tacky Jacks Fort Morgan on a 30' NauticStar Center Console. Perfect for families, bachelor parties, corporate outings, experienced anglers, or first-timers looking for an unforgettable day on the water.

businesses.name: Brick and Spoon
businesses.tagline: An upscale take on breakfast, brunch, and lunch
businesses.description: We're serving a complete, high-quality southern experience for those who want accessible, and upscale breakfast, brunch, and lunch dining. Completely sophisticated yet totally casual, our menu features hearty breakfast and lunch fare paired with deliciously unique cocktails and built-to-order bloody marys. Whether you want a meal and music, or just a place to enjoy a cup of coffee, you'll find what you're looking for here at Brick & Spoon. We're your much-needed neighborhood stop for breakfast, brunch, and lunch—whether you're on a liquid diet or no diet at all! Our owners founded Brick & Spoon because they wanted to spread the southern mojo across the country. Good food, good drinks, good entertainment all get together at Brick & Spoon every day. You and your friends and family should too!

businesses.name: Carmelo Italian
businesses.tagline: Classic & Innovative Italian Cuisine
businesses.description: Located in Orange Beach, Alabama is a purveyor of fine Italian dining. Italian hospitality and innovated Italian cuisine that is guaranteed to grow your appetite. Enjoy choosing the perfect wine from our expansive collection to complement your meal as you sit in our dining room that combines contemporary decor with vintage Italian staples.

businesses.name: COASTAL Orange Beach
businesses.tagline: Great food, live music, and the best views of the Gulf of Mexico
businesses.description: COASTAL Orange Beach provides a waterfront restaurant, an open-air bar, and a lifestyle store all with tremendous beachfront views. Located directly on the sugar white sands, COASTAL offers beachfront breakfast, lunch, and dinner service. The restaurant serves fresh local seafood and unique culinary items from award-winning chefs. The beachside bar features live music, tropical cocktails, and fresh Gulf dishes. COASTAL Store offers apparel, accessories, beach gear, and coastal lifestyle products.

businesses.name: Cobalt The Restaurant
businesses.tagline: Contemporary coastal cuisine at its best
businesses.description: Welcome to Cobalt the Restaurant. Come experience contemporary coastal cuisine at its best. Cobalt the Restaurant, located in Orange Beach, features authentic dishes crafted by renowned chefs in three distinct kitchens. Nestled under the Perdido Pass Bridge, next to Caribe Resort, patrons can enjoy a spectacular view of the bay from every table. For those who wish to approach by water, there are numerous boat slips available for small boats as well as medium-sized yachts. However you choose to arrive, Cobalt offers a casual and relaxing atmosphere with waterfront dining, live music, and superior service. Open daily for lunch and dinner.

businesses.name: Cosmos Restaurant and Bar
businesses.tagline: Far From Ordinary
businesses.description: Off the beaten path on Canal Road in Orange Beach, Cosmo's Restaurant & Bar is far from ordinary. Serving fresh and eclectic food since day one, Cosmo's features a wide range of dining, enticing even the most discriminate. Using chef inspired ingredients, you can enjoy everything from hand-cut steaks to local seafood and pasta. This neighborhood favorite on the Gulf Coast has taken cuisine to the cutting edge. With variations of local staples, their versions will make you sit back and take notice. Culinary greats such as the chicken roulade, the sesame seared tuna salad and the traditional crab cakes done with a twist, will have you wanting more. The Banana Leaf Wrapped Fish was named by The Year of Alabama Food as one of the top 100 dishes to eat before you die.

businesses.name: Crico's Pizza & Subs
businesses.tagline: The Best Pizza & Subs At The Beach Since 1998!
businesses.description: Crico's Pizza and Subs in Gulf Shores, AL, is a beloved local eatery renowned for its delicious pizzas and mouthwatering subs. Nestled in the heart of Gulf Shores, this cozy establishment offers a welcoming atmosphere where patrons can enjoy freshly prepared meals with friends and family. From traditional pepperoni pizzas to specialty pies loaded with gourmet toppings, Crico's caters to every pizza lover's cravings. Their subs are equally tantalizing, with a variety of options ranging from classic Italian combos to hearty meatball subs. With friendly service and quality ingredients, Crico's Pizza and Subs is a must-visit destination for both locals and tourists craving authentic and satisfying meal on the Alabama Gulf Coast.

businesses.name: DeSoto's Seafood Kitchen
businesses.tagline: Locally-Owned Seafood Restaurant in Gulf Shores, AL
businesses.description: Award winning DeSoto's Seafood Kitchen, one of Gulf Shores, Alabama's favorite family restaurants features fresh seafood, chicken, pasta, steak, home style sides, salads and sandwiches. Our daily lunch specials include seafood, chicken, country fried and hamburger steak, ham, 12 great homemade sides, and our fabulous fresh baked rolls. Our dinner menu features exquisite appetizers, seafood favorites prepared your way: fried, broiled, grilled, blackened, steamed, or Cajun style, plus chicken and pasta dishes and one great Hawaiian Ribeye steak. Try the fresh catch and have it prepared New Orleans, Mediterranean, Caribbean, or our house favorite Pecan Encrusted Style. We offer an excellent wine choices and homemade desserts to compliment your meal. Voted Best Lunch and Best Dinner 14 Years in a Row. People's Choice winner for Friendliest staff for 5 Years. Located just one block north of the Gulf of Mexico, in the heart of Gulf Shores.

businesses.name: Doc's Seafood Shack & Oyster Bar
businesses.tagline: Where Gulf Coast Alabama locals go for fresh seafood and Doc's famous fried shrimp
businesses.description: Doc's Seafood Shack & Oyster Bar is an Orange Beach seafood restaurant voted TOP 10 Seafood Shacks in America by Fox News. Serving the very best seafood since 1984, including their world-famous fried shrimp, seafood platters, seafood gumbo, oysters on the half shell, and fresh fish. With 34+ years of experience, Doc and his staff are always cooking up boatloads of fresh Gulf Coast seafood. Build your own seafood platter, enjoy lunch specials, raw oysters, chicken fingers, onion rings, and cold draft beer. Not fancy, but full of charm. Flip-flops are welcome!

businesses.name: Down South BBQ
businesses.tagline: Serving the Best Barbecue on the Coast
businesses.description: Down South Barbecue is located between Foley and Gulf Shores, Alabama, right on the way to the Alabama Beach. We serve the best barbecue on the coast from our family-size umbrella covered tables. Now serving breakfast! Drop by and eat your lunch or supper. After a long drive to the beach, don't worry about cooking! Let Mama relax. Get a complete meal for all your family. Great food at a fair price. We cater for big orders - call ahead so we have time to properly prepare the very best Southern Barbecue for your group!

businesses.name: Efes Greek Kitchen
businesses.tagline: Mediterranean restaurant featuring casual quick service classics
businesses.description: We are a Mediterranean restaurant featuring casual quick service classics. Offering drive through pickup with a small outside patio.

businesses.name: Flora-Bama Lounge and Oyster Bar
businesses.tagline: The World Famous Beach Bar - Live Music 365 Days a Year
businesses.description: There are many stories about how the most famous beach bar in the country, the Flora-Bama Lounge, became the iconic location it is today. Some of the stories are even true and a few others were thought up on a local bar stool. The truth is that in 1962 the State of Florida gave the State of Alabama two miles of beach front land in return for the construction of the Perdido Pass Bridge. The Tampary family (Father Ted with sons Connie and Tony) decided to build a small bar and package store on the new State Line. The Flora-Bama was originally constructed in 1964, two years after the road was completed. In the early days of the Flora-Bama, the lounge was practically the only thing in the area. As traffic began to increase along the new highway, business grew and the lounge grew to match it with new construction added piecemeal to accommodate the larger crowds. At the time it was established Escambia County, Florida, in which it is located was "wet" while across the line Baldwin County, Alabama, was "dry". The Tamparys created a camaraderie rarely found among people of all ages and walks of life. Joseph Gilchrist purchased the tiny lounge and package store on April 17, 1978, and made live music a daily staple. Joined in 1986, by partner Pat McClellan, together they created calendar events like the "Interstate Mullet Toss" and the "Frank Brown Songwriter's Festival," named after the early, imposing night watchman. In 2009, John McInnis and Cameron Price became co-owners of the Flora-Bama, along with Joe and Pat, to carry it into the next 50 years. Together these four owners have carried on the tradition of making the Country's Best Beach Bar a place where everyone feels comfortable and leaves smiling. Today the live music at the Flora-Bama consist of local favorites to Platinum selling recording artist. The events range from chili cookoffs and fishing rodeos to the Annual Mullet Toss and big beach front concerts. The best part is there is always someone and something different going on at the Flora-Bama every day and you never know who is going to be sitting next to you.

businesses.name: Foam Coffee
businesses.description: Coming Fall 2032

businesses.name: Gelato Joe's Italian Restaurant & Bar
businesses.tagline: Where Italian Flavors Await
businesses.description: At Gelato Joe's, we believe every meal should be a celebration of life, love, and laughter. We bring the vibrant flavors of Italy to your table, combining authentic recipes, fresh ingredients, and a warm, welcoming atmosphere. Whether you're here for our homemade gelato, hearty Italian dishes, or a night of fun on The Deck, every visit promises delicious memories and good times. Authentic Italian flavors in every bite, savor the richness of handcrafted recipes passed down through generations. From creamy gelato to hearty pastas, our dishes embody Italy's timeless culinary traditions. Innovative twists on classic recipes blend tradition and creativity with dishes that stay true to Italian roots while embracing modern flavors.

businesses.name: GTs On The Bay
businesses.tagline: Good Food. Good Friends. Good Times.
businesses.description: GTs On The Bay sits overlooking Wolf Bay on Canal Road in the heart of Orange Beach. With stunning views and bay front dining, GTs features a diverse and one-of-a-kind menu. Guests can savor unique culinary choices and a blend of local favorites, in addition to special creations with a family friendly atmosphere. Enjoy a stone hearth pizza oven and fresh made salad bar as well as craft beers and daily happy hour.

businesses.name: Gulf Island Grill
businesses.tagline: Grillin' on the beach since 2003!
businesses.description: Established in 2003 by Freddie and Pat Peninger, Gulf Island Grill is known for its unique tropical flavors and world famous smoked ribs! We provide dine-in or carry out. From snowbirds to spring breakers, we guarantee you'll be satisfied. Fresh seafood and savory burgers served everyday. Our drink menu has a variety of tropical cocktails, creamy bushwackers, and local craft beers to choose from!

businesses.name: Gulf State Park
businesses.tagline: Multi-use recreational state park with beach, lake, trails, and accommodations
businesses.description: Gulf State Park is a 6,150-acre state park featuring beach pavilions, nature center, swimming pool, Lake Shelby day-use area with kayaking and canoeing, fishing and education pier, backcountry biking trails, butterfly garden, learning campus, interpretive center, hiking trails, geocaching, paddle sports, and more. The park offers accommodations including The Lodge at Gulf State Park (Hilton Hotel), lakeside cabins, woods cabins, eagle cottages, improved 496-site campground with full hookups, primitive camping, and glamping sites.

businesses.name: Happy Harbor
businesses.tagline: The Largest Watersports Company in Orange Beach
businesses.description: Happy Harbor is the largest watersports company in Orange Beach with two convenient locations. We offer a great atmosphere for families to enjoy water activities with friendly, clean, and fast service. Choose from our huge selection of family fun double-decker pontoons with slides, waverunners, center consoles, kayaks and more. Whether you have a need for speed or would like to cruise on the water for the day, we have it all. Get your happy on at Happy Harbor Marina!

businesses.name: Happy Harbor Marina
businesses.tagline: The Island's Watersports Headquarters
businesses.description: Happy Harbor is the largest watersports rental company in Orange Beach, AL! In business since 2007, we are a family owned and operated company that has been providing fun on the water for over 18 years. We pride ourselves on our family friendly atmosphere and helpful crew, as well as the cleanest and best maintained inventory in the business. We have over 50 vessels to choose from, including double and single deck pontoons for the whole family, center consoles to cruise around the waterways, jet skis to feed your need for speed, or paddle sports for a more relaxing excursion.

businesses.name: Hurricane Grill & Wings
businesses.tagline: Easy-going, beach lifestyle in totally relaxed restaurant form
businesses.description: Hurricane Grill & Wings works hard to bring you that easy-going, beach lifestyle in totally relaxed restaurant form. With quality sourced, award-winning wings and a bar side atmosphere overflowing with beers, we've created a place for regulars and visitors, friends and families alike.

businesses.name: Island Wing Company
businesses.tagline: Get Baked! It's always a fun time on the Island.
businesses.description: Island Wing Company is a full-service casual dining restaurant and bar specializing in crispy chicken wings and tenders served alongside eclectic takes on burgers, tacos, mac and cheese and more. With a lively atmosphere perfect for friends and family, we offer an extensive menu of food and drinks including a large draft beer list, frozen drinks, and cocktails. Enjoy Island Time while watching the latest game, enjoying live music, or catching up with loved ones.

businesses.name: Jesse's Restaurant
businesses.tagline: Comfortable and inviting atmosphere perfect for casual fine dining
businesses.description: Jesse's Restaurant offers a comfortable and inviting atmosphere that is perfect for a casual fine dining experience. Their menu features flavorful and innovative dishes that are created with fresh, locally sourced ingredients, as well as hand-crafted cocktails and a diverse selection of wines. Jesse's is committed to providing exceptional, personalized service and an unparalleled dining experience that keep their customers coming back for more. Whether you are celebrating a special occasion or simply looking to enjoy a delicious meal with friends and family, Jesse's Restaurant is the perfect destination for a memorable dining experience.

businesses.name: Kilwins
businesses.tagline: Handcrafted fudge, caramel apples, ice cream, and more. Since 1947, we've made the finest chocolates and ice cream!
businesses.description: Experience Kilwins: handcrafted fudge, caramel apples, ice cream, and more. Since 1947, Kilwins has promised to make the best possible chocolates, fudge, and ice cream. Our made-in-store products like hand-crafted waffle cones, Mackinac Island Fudge, caramel apples, caramel corn, brittle, and dozens of Kilwins Heritage Chocolate-dipped treats continue the tradition of offering a feast for the senses. Discover Kilwins, where the magic of hand-crafted confections and Original Recipe Ice Cream meet the warmth of exceptional service.

businesses.name: King Neptune's Seafood Restaurant
businesses.tagline: Family-owned for 25 years, King Neptune's is the local's favorite spot to eat.
businesses.description: Family-owned for 25 years, King Neptune's Seafood Restaurant is known for fresh Gulf seafood, friendly service, and recipes refined for decades. The kitchen focuses on timing and technique—hand-breading seafood to order, grilling to temperature, and finishing every plate hot and flavorful. Owner Al Sawyer has spent a lifetime honing culinary skills to showcase the delectable fruits of the Gulf. King Neptune's is particularly famous for Royal Red Shrimp, deep-water Gulf shrimp known for their naturally sweet, delicate flavor. The restaurant is family-friendly, welcoming everyone from kids to grandparents, and offers dine-in, takeout, and larger orders for gatherings. The Sawyers have taken home first place at the Food Show in New Orleans, beating out 500 competitors including renowned Chef Paul Prudhomme. King Neptune's has been featured on Bobby Flay's Food Nation, The Travel Channel's Travel Deep in the South, Southern Living magazine, and Travel USA.

businesses.name: Kitty's Kafe
businesses.tagline: Home Style Meals Served with True Southern Hospitality
businesses.description: Upon entering Kitty's Kafe, locals and visitors alike are greeted by a warm, friendly, casual family atmosphere. Whether joining us for a Southern Style Country Breakfast, enjoying one of our many delicious lunch items, or one of our scrumptious entrees, our food is prepared daily from the freshest ingredients. We invite you to dine with us, and enjoy a cocktail from our full service bar.

businesses.name: Kraken Reels Charter Services
businesses.tagline: Top Rated Deep Sea & Nearshore Fishing
businesses.description: Kraken Reels Charter Services delivers the best deep sea fishing experience out of Orange Beach, Alabama. Led by Captain Jon Ray and his experienced crew, every trip is a fishing adventure tailored to your needs — from family-friendly nearshore runs to adrenaline-filled offshore expeditions. Operating out of Reel Surprise Marina in Orange Beach, Kraken Reels runs a 47-foot Sports Fisherman and a 30-foot Robalo Center Console, both equipped with state-of-the-art electronics, federal permits, and everything you need for a trophy day on the water. Perfect For: Families, bachelor parties, corporate outings, experienced anglers, or first-timers looking for an unforgettable day on the Gulf of Mexico.

businesses.name: Mikee's Seafood Restaurant
businesses.tagline: Family Owned Seafood Restaurant in Gulf Shores Since 1987
businesses.description: For over 35 years, Mikee's Seafood has been a Gulf Shores staple, serving up fresh, Southern-style seafood with a warm, family-friendly atmosphere. Proudly family-owned and operated since 1987, Mikee's is more than just a restaurant—it's a local tradition. Whether you're craving all-you-can-eat snow crab, a golden-fried seafood platter, or a refreshing Bushwacker from the bar, Mikee's is the spot where locals and visitors come together to eat, laugh, and make memories. The menu is packed with crowd favorites, from perfectly fried shrimp to grilled catch-of-the-day, all seasoned with that unmistakable Gulf Coast flavor.

businesses.name: Moe's Original BBQ
businesses.tagline: A Southern Soul Food Revival
businesses.description: Moe's Original BBQ has been named in the Top 10 BBQ Chains in America by USA Today and The Daily Meal, one of the fastest growing, emerging restaurant chains by Restaurant Business Magazine, and one of the Top 10 Rib Joints in the U.S. by Relish. Moe's Original BBQ proudly serves up Alabama-Style Barbeque to customers across the country.

businesses.name: Orange Beach History Museum
businesses.tagline: Preserving Orange Beach's Native American and fishing heritage
businesses.description: The Orange Beach History Museum houses local artifacts and memorabilia relating to Native American and fishing heritage. Originally built in 1910 as a schoolhouse, it has served as a museum since 1995 and was moved to its present location in 1999. Families of early fishermen have donated supplies and collectibles that make visitors mindful of the challenges and achievements in the early days of the fishing industry. The facility underwent renovations completed in December 2023.

businesses.name: OSO at Bear Point Harbor
businesses.tagline: Fresh Food, Live Music Every Day, Amazing Sunsets and Waterfront Dining
businesses.description: OSO at Bear Point Harbor is a waterfront restaurant serving lunch and dinner with a full menu featuring seafood, burgers, steaks and more. Guests can enjoy amazing sunset views from the main and upstairs dining areas, outside decks, and tiki bar. The restaurant features live music every day with hottest local and touring artists entertaining guests. Dine-in and takeout available with online ordering for curbside/dockside pickup.

businesses.name: Papa Rocco's
businesses.tagline: The Home of Warm Beer and Lousy Pizza
businesses.description: Papa Rocco's is a casual dining restaurant in Gulf Shores, AL famous for award-winning pizzas, fresh local oysters, and baked buffalo wings. We're consistently voted the People's Choice Best Pizza and have won the People's Choice Award for Best Raw Oysters fifteen years running in Gulf Shores. We feature live music every day with the best local artists performing nightly. Perfect for gameday meals, happy hour, and special occasions.

businesses.name: Pelican Grill
businesses.tagline: Premier destination for fresh Gulf Coast seafood and handcrafted cocktails
businesses.description: Pelican Grill is located at the SanRoc Cay Marina in Orange Beach, Alabama, offering an unforgettable dining experience with exquisite Gulf Coast cuisine. The restaurant features family-friendly dining with fresh seafood specialties including charbroiled oysters, grouper, snow crab legs, and shrimp dishes. The Tipsy Pelican Oyster and Daiquiri Patio Bar offers live music. Customers can dine in, take out, or even bring their own catch to be prepared. The restaurant prides itself on warm hospitality and a vibrant atmosphere perfect for family gatherings, special occasions, or casual nights out.

businesses.name: Perch at Gulf State Park
businesses.tagline: Steaks, Seafood, Sunsets
businesses.description: Perch is not the typical steakhouse or coastal seafood restaurant. It's the perfect venue where everyone can relax, enjoy elevated food, unique wines, and hand-crafted cocktails, all while enjoying a gorgeous view of Alabama's Gulf Coast. An elevated dining experience featuring premium steaks, fresh seafood, unique wines, and handcrafted cocktails with a place where everyone can relax and enjoy gorgeous Gulf Coast sunsets.

businesses.name: Perdido Beach Resort
businesses.tagline: Escape to luxury at Perdido Beach Resort. Enjoy Gulf-front views, exquisite dining, and endless relaxation at our beachfront hotel in Orange Beach, Alabama.
businesses.description: Perdido Beach Resort is a premier beachfront hotel in Orange Beach, Alabama, offering Gulf-front views, exquisite dining options, and endless relaxation. The resort features luxurious accommodations including rooms and suites with various views, multiple dining venues, aquatic adventures, live music entertainment, and comprehensive meeting and wedding facilities.

businesses.name: POUR Smart Bar
businesses.tagline: The Only Smart Bar in Orange Beach, Alabama
businesses.description: The Only Smart Bar in Orange Beach, Alabama - a unique bar experience offering craft cocktails and upcoming events.

businesses.name: Rotolo's Pizzeria
businesses.tagline: Good Food. Good Vibes.
businesses.description: Rotolo's Pizzeria uses only the freshest ingredients! We make our original dough fresh daily at each location. Combine that with our homemade sauces and freshly prepared vegetables, and you have a recipe for a delicious meal! We're bringing in a slew of draft beer options so every local can enjoy their favorites. And we're doing it all in a cool atmosphere that you'll look forward to visiting time and again. Honoring our roots by exploring scratch kitchen creations and even better versions of the authentic recipes that our customers know and love.

businesses.name: Sea N Suds - Restaurant and Oyster Bar
businesses.tagline: Beachfront Dining - Fresh Gulf Seafood
businesses.description: Family-owned since 1975, Sea-N-Suds is one of the original family-friendly restaurants in Gulf Shores, AL. Founded by David Bodenhamer and Gerald King, the restaurant stretches over sugar-white sand just a couple of feet from the waters of the Gulf of Mexico. They offer true beachfront dining with views of Alabama sunsets and the sounds of waves. The restaurant features an outside deck for outdoor dining.

businesses.name: Shipp's Dockside Grill
businesses.tagline: Your Premier Waterfront Seafood Restaurant at Orange Beach Marina

sunday.notes: Lower Deck 11am-3pm; Upper Deck Brunch 11am-3pm, Dinner 11am-9pm

businesses.description: The Shipp family returns to Orange Beach with two distinct culinary experiences: dockside seafood and sushi on the lower deck and Chef Matt's signature dishes with craft cocktails on the upscale yet relaxed upper deck. Experience fresh seafood, tender steaks, and exquisite sushi with breathtaking views of Orange Beach Marina. Choose between casual counter service on the Lower Deck or family-friendly full-service dining on the Upper Deck.

businesses.name: Southern Rose Parasailing Cruises
businesses.tagline: Experience the beauty of Gulf Shores with parasailing at Southern Rose Parasailing & Dolphin Cruises
businesses.description: Since 2004, Southern Rose Parasailing & Dolphin Cruises has been offering the best parasailing adventures in Orange Beach, Gulf Shores and Perdido Key. Whether you are an experienced veteran or this is your first outing, experience the thrill of flying with the best adventure company on Alabama's Gulf Coast. We have the largest fleet of parasail boats in the area, and all of our vessels and crew are U.S. Coast Guard approved. Soar up to 800 feet in the air and admire the views of Alabama's picturesque coastline. Parasailing is available for all ages (3 and up), with double and triple parasailing adventures. We also offer dolphin cruises, jet ski rentals, banana boat rides, boat rentals, and jet ski dolphin tours.

businesses.name: Southern Shores Coffee
businesses.tagline: Local coffee roaster & restaurant with two Gulf Coast locations
businesses.description: Southern Shores Coffee is a family-owned local coffee roaster and coffee shop located in Gulf Shores, Alabama, known for our signature Bushwacker Coffee, crafted with passion and precision. We're a cozy spot where locals and tourists alike can enjoy freshly roasted coffee and warm hospitality. Our second location, Southern Shores Eats & Drinks, is in Historic Downtown Foley, Alabama, offering hearty breakfast and lunch, brunch options, signature drinks, mimosas, and Bloody Marys. Our full breakfast menu, buffet, and mouthwatering lunch favorites include sandwiches and thin-crust tavern pizzas. Scallywags Pizza serves up Midwest-style thin-crust pies with toppings edge to edge as well as Chicago Stuffed Pizza. Whether you're in for coffee and a quick bite, or pizza, beer and pinball, we're here to serve you.

businesses.name: Sugar Shack
businesses.tagline: Wisconsin's Only Male Dancers - Adult Entertainment in Lake Geneva
businesses.description: Sugar Shack is home to the best adult entertainment in Lake Geneva. We have been hosting the finest female dancers for over thirty years and recently added Wisconsin's only male dancers venue on our second floor. Our Girls and Guys are here to make your get-together memorable. From bachelor parties to birthdays, there's always a good time at Sugar Shack. Perfect for bachelorette parties, girls' nights out, and special celebrations.

businesses.name: Sunliner Diner
businesses.tagline: A Classic 1950s Themed American Diner
businesses.description: Hey there, sugar—welcome to Sunliner Diner! We're so glad you rolled in. Around here, we believe in slowing things down, turning up the jukebox, and making every meal feel like a celebration. From chrome booths and creamy milkshakes to breakfast all day and burgers that'll make your heart sing, we've packed a whole lot of joy into every corner of this 1950s dream. Whether you're sharing pancakes with your little ones or catching up with old friends over a slice of pie, Sunliner is all about togetherness, nostalgia, and the kind of comfort that never goes out of style. So hop in, baby—your table's ready, the coffee's hot, and there's always room for a little more sweetness in your day. We're so happy you're here. The Sunliner Diner Family

businesses.name: Surfside Pizza
businesses.tagline: Surf's Up, Pizza Lovers!
businesses.description: Surfside Pizza is a locally owned, family-operated restaurant in Orange Beach, Alabama, where quality comes first. We craft our dough and sauce by hand daily, using only the freshest, most flavorful toppings. Unlike the big chains, you won't find frozen crusts or bland ingredients here—just delicious, made-from-scratch pizza you'll love!

businesses.name: Tacky Jacks Seafood Restaurant and Tavern
businesses.tagline: The best waterfront seafood restaurants in Orange Beach and Gulf Shores AL
businesses.description: Tacky Jacks Seafood Restaurant and Tavern is the best waterfront seafood restaurant and tavern in Orange Beach, Gulf Shores, and Fort Morgan AL. Great Food, Casual Dining, Waterfront Views. Serving Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner Daily at all three locations. By Land or By Sea - voted Local's Favorite Hangout.

businesses.name: Tee Off at The Wharf Powered by TOPGOLF Swing Suites
businesses.tagline: LIVE. LAUGH. PLAY! Golf Simulators, Sports Games, Dining & a Sports Bar in Orange Beach, AL
businesses.description: Tee Off powered by Topgolf Swing Suite is a dining and entertainment venue that features golf-simulation games and a variety of other virtual sports and games using state-of-the-art technology. This fun and interactive restaurant is located at The Wharf in sunny Orange Beach, Alabama and is ideal for team-building events, corporate outings, happy hours, birthday parties and more. Topgolf Swing Suite and its Full Swing golf simulator provide endless opportunities for fun. Whether you're an aspiring golf pro or picking up a club for the first time, Topgolf is for everyone. With an array of games to choose from, you can go from crushing a 7-iron to tossing a football for a game-winning pass in a matter of minutes.

businesses.name: The Beach House Kitchen & Cocktails
businesses.tagline: Gulf Shores favorite offering the best casual seafood dining experience on the island
businesses.description: The Beach House Kitchen & Cocktails features a variety of Gulf seafood, quality American cuisine and carefully crafted cocktails. Our food is prepared using the freshest ingredients and all of our seafood comes from the Gulf of Mexico, by way of Bon Secour, AL. Our dining atmosphere is casual (you can eat on the porch too!) and you're sure to find something you'll love on our menu! We're located down West Beach, right across the street from the white sand beaches in Gulf Shores, AL!

businesses.name: The Cove Bar and Grill
businesses.tagline: Hot Food, Cold Drinks, Live Music and Serious Fun!
businesses.description: The Cove Bar and Grill is the hottest restaurant in Gulf Shores, delivering bold flavors, cold drinks, and live music in a fun, electric atmosphere. Located just minutes from the beach, The Cove serves up a full menu of fresh, flavorful food from casual bites to hearty meals, with something for every appetite. With indoor and outdoor dining, pool tables, TVs, and a laid-back vibe, The Cove has become a true gathering place where locals and visitors alike come for great eats, great tunes, and unforgettable moments. Live music Monday through Saturday keeps the party going with local musicians and traveling bands filling the stage.

businesses.name: The Galley on the River
businesses.tagline: Fresh Flavors Meet Riverside Charm
businesses.description: The Galley on the River offers fresh cuisine, relaxed dining, and stunning river views right on the Bon Secour River. Whether you arrive by boat at our 70-foot pier or by car, we're the perfect spot for any occasion. We specialize in locally-sourced dishes and handcrafted drinks, from our famous seafood platters and Ahi Tuna Nachos to hand-pressed burgers and wood-fired pizzas. Every visit is a fresh experience. Perfect For: Date night, family dinner, waterfront lunch, group celebrations, or just relaxing with a cold drink by the river.

businesses.name: The Gulf Orange Beach
businesses.tagline: The seaside hideaway you dreamed you'd find for a gathering of friends, family or loved ones
businesses.description: The Gulf is the seaside hideaway you dreamed you'd find for a gathering of friends, family or loved ones. A truly enchanting seaside setting with a chic and casual ambience that makes everyone comfortable and welcome. The elegant rustic cuisine has made the Gulf a destination experience with seasonal menus featuring the freshest local ingredients. The bar seems to anticipate the mood and mixture of the moment and with genuine thoughtfulness the staff sets just the appropriate tone. The design features shipping containers, reclaimed, recycled and salvaged building materials that contrast attractively and good-naturedly with the sand, surf and palms. Gulf Coast scenery, amazing food, and handcrafted cocktails— plus fresh catch, chef specials, and a waterfront view of the GULF that never gets old.

businesses.name: The Hangout Gulf Shores
businesses.tagline: Where 59 ends and the fun begins
businesses.description: The Hangout is the ultimate beachfront destination for family-friendly fun, live entertainment, and unforgettable beachside dining. Located in Gulf Shores, Alabama, we offer direct beach access, free live music, hourly foam parties, and a vibrant party atmosphere. Our menu features Gulf Coast-inspired cuisine including famous seafood boils, the Lifeguard Burger, crispy calamari, and handcrafted cocktails. We are proudly pet-friendly and designed for guests of all ages—from kids to grandparents, locals to visitors, and four-legged friends. With prime beachfront location, open-air dining spaces, ample seating, and convenient parking for team buses, The Hangout is perfect for large groups, sports teams, family gatherings, and private events. Whether you're celebrating, traveling, or simply looking for great food with an ocean view, The Hangout delivers fun, flavor, and coastal charm.

businesses.name: The Lodge at Gulf State Park - Eat & Drink
businesses.tagline: Fresh Dining in Gulf Shores with Multiple Restaurant Options
businesses.description: After a fun day hiking the trails, swimming in the Gulf, or lounging by the pool—you're sure to work up an appetite. The Lodge at Gulf State Park offers dining options for whenever hunger strikes. Each restaurant features a unique dining experience, locally-sourced ingredients, and a community atmosphere.

businesses.name: The Original Oyster House
businesses.tagline: Simply Southern Seafood
businesses.description: The Original Oyster House is the best oyster bar & seafood restaurant in Gulf Shores & Mobile, AL. Known for hand-shucked raw, charbroiled and baked oysters, the Original Oyster House is legendary for fresh Gulf seafood, Southern hospitality and spectacular waterfront views. With vintage seafood house charm, the restaurant offers award-winning gumbo, alligator, crab claws, fish, shrimp, crawfish, burgers, po'boys and create-your-own seafood platters. Features include a fantastic salad bar, over-the-top cheesy grits, and homemade key lime or chocolate chip peanut butter pies. The restaurant is sustainable-focused, being the first in Alabama to recycle oyster shells through the AL Coastal Foundation and the only local restaurant to 'oyster garden' or grow stocker oysters for reef restoration.

businesses.name: The Point Restaurant
businesses.tagline: The Best Seafood In Perdido
businesses.description: The Point Restaurant dates back to the 1950's with fresh caught Mullet. In our 60 years of serving the best seafood around we've managed to perfect the southern seafood dining experience. From local Royal Reds, Oysters, and Crab Claws to Alligator Bites, Burgers and Bar Foods. Every evening at the Point you are sure to find Fresh Catch items, Chef Specials, and delicious desserts. The Courtyard features live bands and a full bar nestled under ancient oak trees with personal fireplaces, gathering style seating, picnic tables, and a stage. We feature bluegrass bands and other local bands on a regular nightly basis.

businesses.name: The Steamer & Baked Oyster Bar
businesses.tagline: Raw, steamed and baked oysters along with a full menu of steamed and grilled seafood
businesses.description: The Steamer and Baked Oyster Bar is a seafood restaurant located in Gulf Shores, Alabama behind Souvenir City. We serve raw, steamed and baked oysters along with a full menu of steamed and grilled seafood. Try our steamed seafood trays for 2 or more served with a combination of Royal Reds, Crab Legs, Oysters, Mussels & Large Tail-on Shrimp!

businesses.name: The Tin Top Restaurant & Oyster Bar
businesses.tagline: Alabama's Best Fresh Gulf Seafood & Prime Hand-Cut Steaks
businesses.description: Located in Bon Secour along the Bon Secour River, The Tin Top Restaurant & Oyster Bar has been serving exceptional Gulf seafood and premium aged steaks since 2004. Founded by Bob Hallmark with a passion for cooking and Southern hospitality, Tin Top offers the finest casual dining experience with fresh oysters, Gulf shrimp, Royal Reds, hand-cut steaks, and seasonal house favorites. The restaurant features a relaxed coastal atmosphere with indoor and patio seating, scratch-made dishes, and a thoughtful selection of beers, wines, and cocktails. Known for exceptional ingredients treated with respect and genuine Southern hospitality, Tin Top is a local favorite and coastal dining destination.

businesses.name: TIKI & RAW BAR
businesses.tagline: Where it's always sunny
businesses.description: Experience the Tiki & Raw Bar at Barometer Orange Beach! Indulge in fresh oysters, sushi-grade tuna, and tropical tiki cocktails in a vibrant, island-style atmosphere. Enjoy ocean fare + beach sides at Tiki & Raw Bar Orange Beach. Everything from fresh oysters and tuna to Nashville Hot Chicken and everything in between. Tiki is your go-to open-air watering hole right on the water, offering stunning views of Terry Cove. This laid-back oasis invites you to relax & enjoy fresh seafood, tropical drinks, and the best sunsets around.

businesses.name: Villaggio Grille
businesses.tagline: Italian Fusion & Seafood Restaurant in Orange Beach, AL

businesses.name: Voyagers
businesses.tagline: Gulf Seafood & Prime Steaks
businesses.description: Discover authentic Gulf Coast cuisine amidst an intimate setting and panoramic Gulf views while dining at Voyagers. Located in Orange Beach, Alabama, Voyagers features a seasonal menu consisting of local produce, sustainable seafood, and organic meats reflecting the flavors of the Orange Beach region. The combination of spectacular views, an award-winning wine list, local gulf caught seafood and dry aged steaks make Voyagers a unique culinary destination. Chef Brody Olive's skillfully prepared and perfectly executed dishes are accompanied by first class service. Voyagers' floor to ceiling windows, contemporary décor, and relaxing background music create a tranquil ambiance. Specializing in fresh coastal cuisine, Voyagers features the Gulf Wild brand which ensures that all seafood served is responsibly caught and harvested by local fisherman operating in the Gulf of Mexico.

businesses.name: Wolf Bay Lodge
businesses.tagline: Local Seafood Tradition est. 1973
businesses.description: Wolf Bay is a family-owned Gulf Coast tradition known for its high quality fresh seafood & local ambience. We pride ourselves on providing a warm and welcoming atmosphere for locals and visitors alike. Whether you choose the Foley or Orange Beach location, we guarantee a memorable culinary journey celebrating the flavors of Alabama's Gulf Coast. Serving our community for over 50 years.

businesses.name: Woodside Restaurant
businesses.tagline: A place for family fun, great food, backyard games, gift shop and the best live local music
businesses.description: Woodside Restaurant is located in the heart of Gulf State Park on State Park Road. Open daily for breakfast, lunch and dinner. Pet-friendly outdoor seating. Food, beer and wine available for carry out.
